initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    item.i_category,
    date_dim.d_year,
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_moy = 11
    AND date_dim.d_year >= 2000
GROUP BY 
    item.i_category, date_dim.d_year
ORDER BY 
    item.i_category ASC, date_dim.d_year ASC
LIMIT 100
